stage_description: The error has been committed. Student wrote '-6x - 12 = 18' (the predicted error: dropped the sign rule on the second term, treated -3 × -4 as -12 instead of +12). They are now operating on a wrong starting point. This stage is for the Reasoning Agent, not the Predictive Risk Agent — the prediction window is closed. The Predictive Risk Agent's correct response here is low confidence and recommend_intervene=false (the time for prediction has passed; reasoning will catch the error).
